# Ableten

> Ableten is your Source Library for everything worth saving—capture highlights, links, and recommendations, organize shared collections, and turn them into trip plans and grounded drafts (not AI guesses).

## Getting Started

Quick paths to first success

- [Homepage & product overview](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Group trip planner (use case)](https://ableten.xyz/trip-planner/)
- [Install Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/hpedofnkgonbhgecgkniomkfmanhmlnm)
- [Sign up / log in to the web app](https://app.ableten.xyz)
- [Support & FAQs](https://ableten.xyz/support.html)

## Core Concepts

Fundamental ideas to understand how Ableten works

- [What is Ableten? (FAQ on homepage)](https://ableten.xyz/#faq-heading)
- [Key terminology: highlights, collections, Source Library](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Video transcript: save → collections → plans and drafts](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Privacy & data handling](https://ableten.xyz/privacy-policy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://ableten.xyz/terms-of-service.html)

### Terminology

- **Highlights** — Text (or OCR text) saved from a webpage, email, or screenshot, usually with an optional personal note.
- **Collections** — Topic folders that group related highlights; Ableten can suggest a collection when you save.
- **Source Library** — The web app (`app.ableten.xyz`) where highlights, collections, and original notes live.
- **Original notes** — Your own ideas captured in the Source Library (not tied to a web URL).
- **Chrome extension** — Highlight while browsing: select text, copy to open the note widget, save with a note.

## Guides

Common use cases and workflows

- [Save anything worth keeping (highlights, links, notes)](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Organize into shared collections](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Capture links and text from images (email & OCR)](https://ableten.xyz/)
- [Plan a group trip from saved recommendations](https://ableten.xyz/trip-planner/)
- [Turn collections into plans and grounded drafts (AI Composer)](https://app.ableten.xyz)
- [Email highlights to save@inbound.ableten.xyz](https://ableten.xyz/support.html)
- [Export open tabs as a bibliography (APA / MLA) — Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/hpedofnkgonbhgecgkniomkfmanhmlnm)
- [Tag References: auto-footnotes in Word documents — Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/hpedofnkgonbhgecgkniomkfmanhmlnm)

- [Landing page](https://ableten.xyz/)
